os-dependencies/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java compiler target and source version from 11 to 21 to support the new JDK baseline.
os-dependencies/pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation will fail or produce incompatible bytecode if the compiler release target is not updated to match the target JDK 21 environment.

os-dependencies/pom.xml.general_idea: Add maven-compiler-plugin source and target configuration to enforce Java version compliance.
os-dependencies/pom.xml.why_exists: Without explicit source/target settings, the compiler may default to an older Java version, causing compilation failures or runtime incompatibilities on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version properties and compiler configuration to target JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project will not compile or run on JDK 21 if the source/target levels remain at 11, and modern JDKs may deprecate or remove support for older release flags.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with JDK 21 compilation.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older compiler plugins may fail to compile code targeting JDK 21 or lack support for new language features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to a version that supports running tests on JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Surefire versions may fail to launch the JVM or detect test engines on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade JUnit Jupiter to version 6.x which is required for JDK 21 support.
pom.xml.why_exists: JUnit 5.x does not officially support JDK 21; tests may fail to compile or run.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Lombok to a version that supports JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Lombok versions may fail to process annotations or compile on JDK 21 due to internal API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Jackson to version 2.21.0 to ensure compatibility with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Jackson versions may have runtime issues or lack support for JDK 21 specific features.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Fastjson2 to a version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older Fastjson2 versions may have runtime errors on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-deploy-plugin to a version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older deploy plugins may fail to execute on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-source-plugin to a version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older source plugins may fail to attach sources on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-javadoc-plugin to a version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older javadoc plugins may fail to generate docs on JDK 21 due to stricter checks or API changes.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-gpg-plugin to a version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older GPG plugins may fail to sign artifacts on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade flatten-maven-plugin to a version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older flatten plugins may fail to resolve properties on JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade central-publishing-maven-plugin to a version compatible with JDK 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older publishing plugins may fail to deploy to Central on JDK 21.
